title: subscribe_events takes last_event_id parameter for RFC 8620 §7.3 resume semantics
description: subscribe_events() accepts an Option<&str> last_event_id and sends it as Last-Event-ID if present. parse_sse_block() returns the id field as the second tuple element. Together, these thread the SSE resume id through the API so callers can reconnect without missing state changes. A future contributor might remove last_event_id as unused complexity, especially if the initial TUI implementation does not track it. Without it, reconnection after a network drop would start the SSE stream from the current server state, missing all StateChange events that occurred during the outage. That forces a full /get call on reconnect rather than incremental /changes, and is worse for both server load and TUI correctness.
close_reason: Decision record — current design is correct, no change needed
